summary: Night Guardian DB-backed persistence testing complete. All 19 backend tests passed (100%). Validated: 1) Login with Cognito credentials works, 2) Night Guardian start/stop/status/update-location/acknowledge-safety endpoints all function correctly with DB persistence, 3) Starting new session correctly ends existing active sessions (no duplicate active sessions bug), 4) System health endpoint still works. Terraform files reviewed - Aurora SG hardened with security_groups instead of cidr_blocks, engine version pinned to 15.3, auto_minor_version_upgrade=false set.

authentication.POST /api/auth/login: PASS - Cognito login returns access_token, role=admin

night_guardian_start.POST /api/night-guardian/start: PASS - Creates DB-backed session, returns guardian_active=true, initial_zone, destination

night_guardian_status.GET /api/night-guardian/status: PASS - Returns full session state from DB (active, location, zone, speed, ETA, alerts, etc)
night_guardian_status.status_no_active_session: PASS - Returns active=false when no session exists

night_guardian_update_location.POST /api/night-guardian/update-location: PASS - Updates location in DB, computes speed/zone
night_guardian_update_location.update_location_no_session: PASS - Returns 404 when no active session

night_guardian_stop.POST /api/night-guardian/stop: PASS - Stops session, returns summary with duration, distance, alerts

night_guardian_acknowledge_safety.POST /api/night-guardian/acknowledge-saf: PASS - Acknowledges safety check, returns acknowledged=true
night_guardian_acknowledge_safety.acknowledge_no_session: PASS - Returns 404 when no active session

no_duplicate_sessions.start_ends_existing_sessions: PASS - Starting new session ends existing active sessions (MultipleResultsFound fix verified)

system_health.GET /api/admin/system-health: PASS - Returns healthy status, services connected

db_persistence.session_data_persists: PASS - Destination, location updates, distance all persist across API calls
db_persistence.full_journey_flow: PASS - start → 5 updates → stop, all data persisted correctly

terraform_review.aurora_security_group: VERIFIED - Uses security_groups (not cidr_blocks) for PostgreSQL ingress from app SG only
terraform_review.auto_minor_version_upgrade: VERIFIED - Set to false in aurora/main.tf
terraform_review.app_security_group: VERIFIED - Created in dev/main.tf, passed to Aurora module via allowed_security_group_ids

critical_code_review_comments: night_guardian_engine.py: _get_active_session() correctly uses .order_by().limit(1) to prevent MultipleResultsFound
night_guardian_engine.py: start_session() correctly ends all stale active sessions before creating new one
night_guardian_engine.py: All functions accept AsyncSession parameter (DB-backed, not in-memory)
guardian.py: GuardianSession model has all necessary fields for tracking (route_points, previous_location, idle_tracking, safety_check fields)
session.py: Connection pooling configured for production load (pool_size=20, max_overflow=10)
aurora/main.tf: SG correctly restricts ingress to app security groups only (not VPC CIDR)
dev/main.tf: App SG created and passed to Aurora module
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used authenticated user's existing UUID for sessions
context_for_next_testing_agent: Night Guardian DB persistence refactor complete and verified. All endpoints work with authenticated user (using user's UUID from JWT token). Custom user_id passed to endpoints must be a valid UUID that exists in the users table (foreign key constraint). Connection pooling enhanced. Terraform Aurora hardening verified (SG, engine pinning, auto-upgrade disabled). No mocked APIs.
